ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., VAE, CE-VAE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process in minutes or hours */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for training (e.g., production data, synthetic data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "f_map_5" REAL /* F-MAP score at rank 5 */,
  "f_map_10" REAL /* F-MAP score at rank 10 */,
  "f_map_20" REAL /* F-MAP score at rank 20 */,
  "f_map_30" REAL /* F-MAP score at rank 30 */,
  "f_map_50" REAL /* F-MAP score at rank 50 */,
  "precision_at_5" REAL /* Precision at rank 5 */,
  "precision_at_10" REAL /* Precision at rank 10 */,
  "recall_at_5" REAL /* Recall at rank 5 */,
  "recall_at_10" REAL /* Recall at rank 10 */,
  "ndcg_at_5" REAL /* Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at rank 5 */,
  "ndcg_at_10" REAL /* Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at rank 10 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in training */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used in training */,
  "corruption" REAL /* Corruption level used in training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in training */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate used in training */,
  "embedding_dim" INTEGER /* Dimension of the embeddings */,
  "hidden_layers" INTEGER /* Number of hidden layers in the model */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hyperparameters were set */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank used in training */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value used in training */,
  "lambda_l2" REAL /* L2 regularization value used in training */,
  "lambda_keyphrase" REAL /* Keyphrase regularization value used in training */,
  "lambda_latent" REAL /* Latent regularization value used in training */,
  "lambda_rating" REAL /* Rating regularization value used in training */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset in records */,
  "validation_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the validation dataset in records */,
  "test_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test dataset in records */,
  "early_stopping_patience" INTEGER /* Number of epochs with no improvement after which training will be stopped */,
  "early_stopping_metric" TEXT /* Metric used for early stopping (e.g., validation loss, F-MAP) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training settings were set */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the training settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_settings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
